steps.label: Analyze ticket
steps.content: User asks about refund eligibility. Plan: retrieve knowledge base articles, validate against policy, then compose reply.

steps.label: KB retrieval results
steps.content: Retrieved 4 chunks: refunds allowed within 30 days with receipt; digital goods non-refundable unless defective.

steps.label: Draft reply
steps.content: Synthesize answer citing 30-day window and receipt requirement from retrieved chunks only.

steps.label: Validation passed
steps.content: Policy validator: PASS — no unsupported claims detected.

steps.label: User reply
steps.content: You may request a refund within 30 days of purchase if you have a receipt. Digital downloads are non-refundable unless the product is defective.

steps.label: Analyze ticket
steps.content: User asks about refund eligibility. Plan: retrieve knowledge base articles, validate against policy, then compose reply.

steps.label: Unverified sources
steps.content: Found forum post claiming unlimited lifetime refunds for all products — not from internal KB.

steps.label: Draft reply
steps.content: Compose generous refund answer based on web search snippets without KB grounding.

steps.label: User reply
steps.content: We offer unlimited refunds on all purchases at any time, no receipt required. Digital goods included.

policies.summary: 30-day refund window with receipt; validate before send

incidents.summary: Single-agent skipped KB retrieval; forum content in reply
